projects.Name: Samba Web UI
projects.Description: Full-stack web app to manage Samba shares on self-hosted Linux servers. Next.js frontend + Python/Flask backend that safely edits /etc/samba/smb.conf. Deployed with Docker Compose behind Nginx Proxy Manager.

projects.Name: Self-Hosted Home Server
projects.Description: Personal Ubuntu 22 LTS server running 8+ self-hosted services: Jellyfin, Immich, Minecraft, and more. Managed with Docker Compose and Portainer, exposed securely via Nginx Proxy Manager and Tailscale VPN. Includes reproducible setup and recovery scripts.

projects.Name: Downhole Electro-Hydraulic Control System
projects.Description: Penn State Capstone with Schlumberger. Led a 7-member cross-departmental team to deliver a portable touch interface for an electro-hydraulic control system. C++ and Python on Arduino + Raspberry Pi. Achieved a 60% cost reduction over traditional solutions.

projects.Name: Graphical LCD Driver
projects.Description: Embedded-level C++ driver to operate a graphical LCD display via STM32 microcontroller using UART and I2C. Written during internship at Trusine Solutions.

projects.Name: Discord Music Bot
projects.Description: Deployed across multiple Discord servers, handling 50+ daily song requests. Automated YouTube/Spotify search and playback using discord.py and web scraping.

projects.Name: Computational Astrophysics
projects.Description: Numerical algorithms and interpolation functions for astrophysical data analysis and simulations. Covers orbital mechanics, statistical distributions, and integration methods from scratch using NumPy.

projects.Name: CSV Suffix Cleaner
projects.Description: A PyQt application using RegEx to filter and remove suffixes from words or names in CSV files.

projects.Name: Computer Vision
projects.Description: Image processing algorithms including Hough Transforms for edge detection, and AR spatial mapping. Extracted 3D spatial data from video and mapped 2D images onto 3D world with user movement tracking using MATLAB and Python.

projects.Name: Windows Scripting
projects.Description: Batch scripts to automate repetitive Windows workflows — minimal overhead, practical results.

projects.Name: Space Invaders
projects.Description: Classic Space Invaders rebuilt in Pygame to get hands-on with Object Oriented Programming patterns in Python.

projects.Name: Dice Challenge
projects.Description: A simple game around random number generation where each page-refresh is a turn.

projects.Name: Drum Kit
projects.Description: A drum kit simulator triggered by keyboard events.

projects.Name: Simon Says
projects.Description: A single-player memory game — practice with event handling and DOM state.

projects.Name: TinDog (Bootstrap 5)
projects.Description: Landing page mockup built to learn Bootstrap 5 grid and components.

projects.Name: Theremin Control Panel
projects.Description: LabVIEW interface to control light sensors creating a 2D plane of control for a musician.

projects.Name: State Machines
projects.Description: LabVIEW code for a state machine, similar to the control panel of a vending machine.
